                   How Or  gs V iew Data
                   Liter acy





                                                      Understanding data
                                                      This includes reading, analysis, it’s value,
                                                      governance, and ethics around data
                                                      ‘Data Driven’ decisions
                                                      Including predictive analysis, but also reflection on
                                                      productivity and performance
                                                      Embedded in structures
                                                      How can we foster data literacy?
                                                      What’s missing?
                                                      A critical insight into how data is embedded into
                                                      everyday life – over emphasis on data literacy as a
                                                      workplace culture or tool

                   Ever      yday Data
                   Liter  acy
                   Fr  amewor    k

                                                     As Burgess et. al. (2022) note, literacy is
                                                     both formal (education) and informal
                                                     (everyday)


                                                     Data literacy  provides a framework  for
                                                     “better understanding  of the way   people
                                                     learn about and respond to the logics,
                                                     infrastructures and flows  of data under
                                                     widening  conditions of datafication.”
                                                     (Burgess, et. al., 2022)

                                                                                                                                                                                              11

                  Data Liter  acy

                  •                         Data literacy is both conceptual and technical
                  •                         Data literacies are not singular
                  •                         Data literacies are critical
                  •                         Data literacies are social    – they are a resource
                                      for public connection and belonging
                  •                         Data literacies are dynamic and change over
                                      time











Communicating with  Data                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                12

                  Data Par     t of       our
                  Ever      yday Life



                                                  Data as part of our everyday  life and work –
                                                  how  do we  understand it?
                                                  Data and work – a history  of efficiency
                                                  through measuring productivity
                                                  Data and ‘the self ’ – tracking the self
                                                  through data (and being tracked)
                                                  Social media and algorithmic literacies –
                                                  understanding  the role of data
                                                  In short –                  platforms pervade our everyday
                                                  life, and platforms are data driven






Communicating with  Data “Datafication can
invite new for       ms of
data liter  acy, but it
can also diminish
other    s”

(Bur  gess, et. al., 2022, p. 95)











                                                     14

                  Ever      yday Data
                  Liter  acies



                                                   “Everyday   data literacies can be understood
                                                   as an emerging set of practices data
                                                   cultures that can contribute to oversight, and
                                                   agency within disciplining, even systems.
                                                   But equally,  everyday   data literacies create
                                                   new opportunities for social learning and
                                                   collective activism, as well  as for the
                                                   amplification of malicious intent and action”
                                                   (Burgess, et. al., 2022, p. 114)










Communicating with  Data                    Liter  acy and
                   Po w e   r
                   Pinney  (2020) argues that data visualization
                   can offer a way   to develop data literacy –
                   and in turn offer a way  solution to uneven
                   data literacies
                   Literacy  can be an enabler of social change
                   – raising questions about power,  and
                   enabling those with  less power  to ask critical
                   questions
                   Literacy  not the only way   to understand
                   engagement with data
                   •                                             Competence
                   •                                             Skill
                   •                                             Know-how
                   •                                             Expertise



Communicating with  Data                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          16

                      W   hy Data
                      Liter  acy?



                                                              It’s more than just understanding  what  data
                                                              is, more than just understanding  how  to use
                                                              data (data capabilities).
                                                              It’s about understanding  the impact of data
                                                              on our world  (the impacts of datafication)
                                                              It’s about understanding  how  and why   data
                                                              pervades our everyday  life













Communicating with  Data                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                17

                        Summar      y






                                                                   Data literacies are multiple (not singular)
                                                                   Data literacies are formal and informal
                                                                   (educational and colloquial)
                                                                   At a basic level, reading, writing,
                                                                   communicating, and understanding  data
                                                                   At a deeper level, understanding  the
                                                                   pervasive nature of data in our everyday   life
